summary: NT Commerce 12.0 - P2 Features Testing (Iteration 77). 24/25 tests passed (100% of testable features), 1 skipped (test@test.com user not in database). All P2 features verified: Repair system with full CRUD + pagination + stats, Wallet system with add/deduct funds + pagination + admin list, Backup system with create/download/restore + stats, AI Robots (all 11 running) with profit_robot using retail_price correctly.

minor.issue: Normal user credential test@test.com / Test@123 does not exist in database - this is data issue not code issue

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ repair_routes.py: Ticket CRUD with auto-increment REP-00001 format working correctly
✅ repair_routes.py: Status history tracking working - creates repair_history entries on status change
✅ repair_routes.py: Pagination endpoint /tickets/paginated returns items, total, page, total_pages
✅ wallet_routes.py: Auto-creates wallet on GET /wallet if none exists for tenant
✅ wallet_routes.py: add-funds and deduct correctly require super_admin role
✅ wallet_routes.py: Transaction pagination working with wallet_id filtering
✅ wallet_routes.py: /wallet/all correctly restricted to super_admin (tenant gets 403)
✅ backup_routes.py: Creates backup with BKP-00001 format and records_count/file_size
✅ backup_routes.py: Download returns StreamingResponse with actual JSON file content
✅ backup_routes.py: Restore endpoint accepts backup_data dict and restores collections
✅ profit_robot.py: Now correctly uses retail_price field (line 105, 125) instead of selling_price
✅ robot_manager.py: All 11 robots initialized correctly (inventory, debt, report, customer, pricing, maintenance, profit, repair, prediction, notification_bot, supplier)

success_rate.backend: 100% (24/24 tested, 1 skipped due to missing test user)

test_credentials.note: test@test.com user does not exist with Test@123 password

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 tested all P2 features. 24/24 core tests passed. Test user test@test.com does not exist in database. All new endpoints use correct authentication: repair routes need tenant_admin, wallet add/deduct need super_admin, backup routes need tenant_admin.

repair_system.create_ticket: PASS - POST /api/repairs/tickets creates ticket with REP-XXXXX number
repair_system.update_ticket_status: PASS - PUT /api/repairs/tickets/{id} updates status to diagnosed with diagnosed_at timestamp
repair_system.repair_stats: PASS - GET /api/repairs/stats returns total and statuses breakdown

wallet_system.auto_create_wallet: PASS - GET /api/wallet creates wallet if not exists
wallet_system.wallet_stats: PASS - GET /api/wallet/stats returns total_wallets, total_balance, total_transactions
wallet_system.tenant_access_restriction: PASS - Tenant correctly denied access to /wallet/all (403)

backup_system.create_backup: PASS - POST /api/backup/create returns BKP-XXXXX with file_size and records_count
backup_system.download_backup: PASS - POST /api/backup/{id}/download returns StreamingResponse with JSON file
backup_system.restore_backup: PASS - POST /api/backup/restore accepts backup_data and restores
backup_system.backup_stats: PASS - GET /api/backup/stats/summary returns total_backups, total_size, active_schedules

ai_robots.robots_status: PASS - GET /api/robots/status shows all 11 robots (inventory, debt, report, customer, pricing, maintenance, profit, repair, prediction, notification_bot, supplier)
ai_robots.run_profit_robot: PASS - POST /api/robots/run/profit returns analysis with top_profitable

login_regression.normal_user_login: SKIPPED - test@test.com user not in database
